profile.name: Kyoungmin Lee
profile.summary: Hi! I am a Ph.D. student at DGIST Computer Vision Lab, advised by Prof. Sunghoon Im. My research focuses on generative models for personalized and consistent visual generation and editing, as well as vision-language models. I'm interested in making generative models more expressive and applicable to real-world creative applications!

about.text: Hello, I am Kyoungmin Lee, a Ph.D. student at DGIST, advised by Prof. Sunghoon Im. My research focuses on generative models for personalized and consistent visual generation and editing, and vision-language models.
quickFacts: Ph.D. Student in ISAI at DGIST

education.degree: Ph.D. in Interdisciplinary Studies of Artificial Intelligence (ISAI)
M.S. in Interdisciplinary Studies of Artificial Intelligence (ISAI)

experience.description: Participated in computer vision research projects and model development for image understanding tasks.
Worked on image and information systems research as part of an international collaboration.

experience.team: Department of Energy Science and Engineering
experience.description: Conducted team-based undergraduate research with emphasis on experimentation and technical reporting.

experience.team: Photo and Electrochemical Materials Science and Engineering Lab
experience.description: Supported lab research activities and technical experiments during summer internship.

projects.title: Personalized and Consistent Image Generation
projects.description: Developed a training-free, scale-wise autoregressive framework for personalized text-to-image generation, improving style and identity consistency across diverse scenarios with fast inference.

projects.title: Multi prompt-based image generation
projects.org: NIPA, Innovation Hub AI Data Convergence Project
projects.description: Developed text-to-image generation models with a focus on efficient sampling in diffusion models and improved the quality of text-based image editing.

projects.title: Stylistic Image Generation and Editing
projects.description: Developed text- and image-guided methods for personalized and style-consistent image generation with strong generalization across diverse domains.

projects.title: Video understanding and Video retrieval
projects.org: KETI, Development of Object Identification Software for Metaverse Streaming Services
projects.description: Worked on video data collection and scene-level video understanding, as well as text-to-video retrieval tasks.

projects.title: Video Tagging and Video retrieval
projects.description: Developed CLIP-based video tagging, prompt-engineered video captioning, and word-based video retrieval methods.

news.title: [Feb 2026] Two papers have been accepted to CVPR 2026. 🎉

exhibitions.description: Presented AI-generated reinterpretations of Miindo by Shin Yun-bok in the styles of Western masters (e.g., Rembrandt, Monet, Van Gogh), along with an interactive installation for visitor-driven image stylization.
